testcase.name: assessmentReportSemanticSimilarity

skipped.message: Requires Bedrock embedding access: bedrock:InvokeModel on amazon.titan-embed-text-v2:0 for the test IAM user. Returns 403 AccessDenied until granted. Re-enable once the embedding model is authorized (or point similarity at another embedding provider).
